sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7670" key="a)natrofeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνατροφ-εύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n7670.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nurturer,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
